info.title: OFAuth Realtime Webhooks
info.description: Generated OpenAPI 3.1 document for OFAuth Realtime webhook payload families.

RealtimeOnlyfansWebsocketConnection.description: Connection context for the source upstream websocket payload.

clientReferenceId.description: Your client reference identifier, if present on the connection.

RealtimeOnlyfansWebsocketEventEnvelope.title: OnlyFans websocket event webhook
RealtimeOnlyfansWebsocketEventEnvelope.description: Webhook envelope for raw upstream OnlyFans websocket activity relayed through OFAuth Realtime.

RealtimeOnlyfansTypingEventData.title: Typing indicator updated
RealtimeOnlyfansTypingEventData.description: A live typing indicator emitted from the upstream OnlyFans websocket stream.

environment.description: OFAuth environment for the source connection.

receivedAt.description: When OFAuth received the upstream websocket payload.

messageType.description: Transport-level websocket frame classification from the relay.

payloadKey.description: Stable OFAuth shape key for this payload.

shapeSubtype.description: Curated subtype label for this payload family.

truncated.description: Whether OFAuth truncated the upstream payload before forwarding it.

rawText.description: Raw upstream payload text, present when the frame was text-based.

rawBase64.description: Raw upstream payload bytes as base64 when the frame was binary.

id.description: Observed participant identifier associated with the typing event.

RealtimeOnlyfansStoriesEventData.title: Stories payload received
RealtimeOnlyfansStoriesEventData.description: A structured upstream websocket payload keyed by `stories`.

environment.description: OFAuth environment for the source connection.

truncated.description: Whether OFAuth truncated the upstream payload before forwarding it.

rawText.description: Raw upstream payload text, present when the frame was text-based.

rawBase64.description: Raw upstream payload bytes as base64 when the frame was binary.

json.description: Structured upstream payload with a top-level `stories` key. Nested fields may expand during beta.

stories.description: Upstream OnlyFans payload for `stories`. Nested fields may expand during beta.

RealtimeOnlyfansChatMessageEventData.title: Chat message received
RealtimeOnlyfansChatMessageEventData.description: A live upstream chat message envelope from the OnlyFans websocket stream.

environment.description: OFAuth environment for the source connection.

truncated.description: Whether OFAuth truncated the upstream payload before forwarding it.

rawText.description: Raw upstream payload text, present when the frame was text-based.

rawBase64.description: Raw upstream payload bytes as base64 when the frame was binary.

api2_chat_message.description: Upstream chat message envelope. OFAuth preserves the upstream shape during beta.

text.description: HTML message body when the message contains text.

200.description: Return any 2xx response promptly after accepting the event.
